{{Quote|The so-called New Republic has no right to issue credits. It is not a legitimate government. But for the purposes of this auction, the transfer will be made in gold peggats.|Quenton|<ref name="TG" />}}
'''Quenton''' was a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] aboard the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']], reporting directly to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]]. When [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] returned, he eventually took the ''Chimaera'' to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in an attempt to [[Mission to Tatooine (Killik Twilight)|recover]] the painting ''[[Killik Twilight]]''. Quenton was sent to the auction in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] to attempt to secure it, but [[Kitster Chanchani Banai|Kitster Banai]] made away with the painting.<ref name="TG" />
